message:
The other day, our pup Charlie decided to play Houdini and slip out of the backyard. As I frantically searched the neighborhood, our family group chat lit up like a Christmas tree! My sister was sending every dog-related meme she could find, while my brother was calling out potential hiding spots. 

After a few very tense minutes (and a few more memes), I finally found him snoozing under a neighbor’s porch, blissfully unaware of the chaos he had caused. 

It got me thinking about how important it is to have a plan for our furry friends. We all love our pets and want them safe, just like the rest of the family. This little refresher helped me feel more prepared for any future adventures. 

Have you ever had a pet-related moment that turned into a family group chat saga? 🐾📱
